annotations.title: Pure gold.
annotations.text: S. Gregory (li. 18. Moral. c. 23) saith, the heavenly state is resembled to gold, precious stone, crystal, glass, and the like, for the purity, clarity, glittering of the glorious bodies: ◦ where one man's body, conscience, and cogitations are represented to another, as corporal things in this life are seen through crystal or glass.
